name: Roxy Aric
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a lower-class shirt and pants with light armored boots. Armed with a black bow and a dagger. Carries poison of sickness.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: bandit, wizard, criminal, hostile, gang member, predator, outlaw
Role: Roxy Aric is a bandit wizard and member of the Black Bow Bandits, a gang that has been plaguing Leyawiin by rousting innocent travelers. She operates alongside Black Brugo and Alonzo, hiding out in the wilderness and using the Ayleid ruin of Telepe as their nighttime base. She knows minor Destruction and Restoration spells, major Alteration and Illusion spells, and minor Conjuration spells (excluding Bound Armor). She has a Bandit Wizard birthsign granting her +25 Fortify Magicka.
Home Location Information: The wilderness halfway between Border Watch and the Ayleid ruin of Telepe, with Telepe serving as their nighttime hideout.
Daily Routine: Roxy spends most of the day hiding out in the wilderness with her companions Black Brugo and Alonzo, preying on innocent travelers. At 8pm they make their way to Telepe, reaching it after about an hour. They spend all night in the Ayleid ruin before heading back outside at 6am to return to their wilderness base.
Personality - The Bandit Mage: Roxy combines magical prowess with banditry, using her spells to help the Black Bow Bandits prey on travelers near Leyawiin. She's part of an organized criminal operation that has become enough of a problem to warrant intervention, showing the gang's effectiveness at their illicit activities.
author: Bethesda
